hero.title: Building the Future
hero.description: With over 27 years of experience, MM Contracting delivers world-class infrastructure, commercial, and residential projects across 25+ countries. We transform visions into reality.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: A Legacy of Engineering Excellence
about.description1: Founded in {{year}}, MM Contracting has grown from a small construction firm into one of the region's most respected engineering and construction companies. Our journey is built on a foundation of quality, integrity, and an unwavering commitment to excellence.
about.description2: Today, we employ over {{employees}} professionals and have successfully delivered more than {{projectsDelivered}} projects across {{countries}} countries. Our portfolio spans residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure sectors, with a reputation for delivering complex projects on time and within budget.
about.altImage: MM Contracting engineering team reviewing construction plans at a project site

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Construction & Engineering Solutions
services.description: From concept to completion, we deliver integrated solutions across the full spectrum of construction and engineering disciplines.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Development
infrastructure.description: Design and construction of critical infrastructure including highways, bridges, utilities, and transportation networks.

industrial.title: Industrial Projects
industrial.description: Specialized industrial facilities designed for efficiency, safety, and compliance with international standards.

designBuild.title: Design & Build
designBuild.description: Integrated design-build solutions that streamline project delivery through single-point accountability.

featuredProjects.subtitle: Featured Projects
featuredProjects.title: Delivering Excellence Across the Globe
featuredProjects.description: Our portfolio showcases some of the most ambitious and technically demanding projects in the region.

alNoorTower.title: Al Noor Business Tower
alNoorTower.description: A 65-story commercial skyscraper featuring state-of-the-art office spaces, premium retail outlets, and world-class amenities. The tower stands as a landmark of modern engineering excellence.

pearlResidences.title: Pearl Luxury Residences
pearlResidences.description: An exclusive residential development featuring 250 luxury apartments with panoramic ocean views, private beaches, and world-class amenities.

gulfHighway.title: Gulf Coastal Highway
gulfHighway.description: A 180-kilometer coastal highway connecting major industrial cities, featuring 12 interchanges, 8 bridges, and advanced traffic management systems.

greenCity.title: Green City Sustainable Community
greenCity.description: A sustainable smart city development with 5,000 residential units, powered entirely by renewable energy, featuring integrated green spaces and smart infrastructure.

industrialPark.title: Al Taawun Industrial Park
industrialPark.description: A 2-million-square-meter industrial park housing 40 manufacturing facilities with shared utility infrastructure, logistics hubs, and worker accommodation.

grandHotel.title: Grand Horizon Hotel & Resort
grandHotel.description: A 5-star luxury hotel with 450 rooms, convention center, spa facilities, and private beach access. The architectural design blends modern luxury with local heritage.

whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.title: What Sets MM Contracting Apart
whyChooseUs.description: Our commitment to excellence, safety, and innovation makes us the preferred partner for the world's most demanding construction projects.

expertise.title: Unmatched Expertise
expertise.description: With over 27 years of experience and 1,500+ successful projects, our team brings unparalleled knowledge to every undertaking.

quality.title: Commitment to Quality
quality.description: We adhere to the highest international quality standards, with rigorous quality control processes at every project phase.

safety.title: Safety First Culture
safety.description: Our industry-leading safety protocols and zero-incident approach ensure every project is delivered without compromise.

innovation.title: Innovation & Technology
innovation.description: We leverage cutting-edge construction technology, BIM, and sustainable practices to deliver superior results.

delivery.title: On-Time Delivery
delivery.description: Our proven project management methodology ensures we consistently deliver projects on schedule and within budget.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: With operations across 25+ countries, we have the capability to execute projects of any scale, anywhere in the world.

industries.subtitle: Industries
industries.title: Serving Critical Sectors Worldwide
industries.description: Our expertise spans multiple industries, allowing us to deliver specialized solutions for the most demanding environments.

oilGas.title: Oil & Gas
oilGas.description: Full-spectrum EPC services for upstream, midstream, and downstream oil and gas facilities, including refineries, pipelines, and processing plants.

powerEnergy.title: Power & Energy
powerEnergy.description: Design and construction of power generation facilities including thermal, solar, wind, and nuclear power plants with grid integration.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.description: Comprehensive transportation infrastructure solutions including highways, railways, airports, seaports, and mass transit systems.

water.title: Water & Environment
water.description: Water treatment facilities, desalination plants, dam construction, and environmental remediation projects for sustainable water management.

mining.title: Mining & Metals
mining.description: Development of mining infrastructure, mineral processing facilities, smelters, and material handling systems for the mining industry.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Facilities
healthcare.description: Design and construction of hospitals, medical centers, research laboratories, and healthcare campuses meeting international accreditation standards.

partners.subtitle: Strategic Partners
partners.title: Trusted Collaborations
partners.description: We collaborate with the industry's leading organizations to deliver engineering excellence across every project.
partners.noPartnersFound: No partners found for this category.

clients.subtitle: Our Clients
clients.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
clients.description: We are proud to partner with the world's leading energy, infrastructure, and development organizations.

news.subtitle: Latest News
news.title: Staying at the Forefront of the Industry
news.description: Explore our latest projects, achievements, and corporate updates.

news1.title: MM Contracting Awarded $1.2B Gulf Coastal Highway Project
news1.excerpt: The company secures its largest infrastructure contract to date, spanning 180 kilometers along the eastern coast.

news2.title: Green City Sustainable Community Reaches Construction Milestone
news2.excerpt: Phase one of the 5,000-unit sustainable smart city development is now 60% complete, ahead of schedule.

news3.title: MM Contracting Achieves ISO 45001:2025 Certification
news3.excerpt: The company demonstrates its commitment to occupational health and safety with the latest international certification.

news4.title: Grand Horizon Hotel Wins International Architecture Award
news4.excerpt: The recently completed luxury resort in Doha receives recognition for its innovative design and sustainable features.

news5.title: MM Contracting Expands Operations into Southeast Asia
news5.excerpt: New regional headquarters in Singapore marks the company's strategic expansion into the rapidly growing ASEAN market.

news6.title: Innovation in Construction: MM Contracting Launches BIM Center
news6.excerpt: A state-of-the-art Building Information Modeling center to drive digital transformation across all projects.

certificates.subtitle: Certificates & Accreditations
certificates.title: Commitment to Global Standards
certificates.description: Our certifications reflect our unwavering dedication to quality, safety, environmental responsibility, and engineering excellence.
certificates.pageDescription: Every MM Contracting project is backed by internationally recognized certifications that validate our commitment to the highest standards of quality, safety, and environmental responsibility.

company.name: MM Contracting
company.description: A premier engineering and construction company delivering world-class infrastructure, commercial, and residential projects across the globe.

visionMission.visionDescription: To be the most trusted and respected engineering and construction company globally, recognized for transforming communities through innovative, sustainable, and exceptional infrastructure solutions that stand the test of time.
visionMission.missionDescription: To deliver engineering and construction excellence through unwavering commitment to quality, safety, and innovation. We strive to exceed client expectations, empower our people, and contribute to sustainable development in every community we serve.

history.subtitle: Our Journey
history.title: A Legacy of Engineering Excellence
history.description: From a small team of 20 engineers to a global workforce of 12,000+ professionals — explore the milestones that shaped MM Contracting.

founded.title: Foundation of MM Contracting
founded.description: MM Contracting was established with a vision to become a leading force in the construction industry. Starting with a small team of 20 engineers, the company undertook its first residential project in Dubai.

firstMajor.title: First Major Infrastructure Project
firstMajor.description: Awarded our first large-scale infrastructure contract — a 45 km highway project connecting key economic zones. This marked MM Contracting's entry into the infrastructure sector and established our reputation for delivery excellence.
firstMajor.highlight: First infrastructure contract awarded in the northern region

international.title: International Expansion
international.description: Opened regional offices in Saudi Arabia and Qatar, expanding operations beyond the UAE. Within two years, we secured contracts worth $500M across the GCC region, establishing a truly international footprint.

landmark.title: Landmark Tower Completion
landmark.description: Completed our first super-tall building — a 65-story commercial tower in the heart of the business district. This project showcased our capability to deliver complex high-rise structures to international standards.

diversification.title: Diversification into Industrial Sector
diversification.description: Entered the industrial construction sector with a $1.2B petrochemical plant contract. This strategic move diversified our portfolio, reduced market risk, and positioned us as a key player in the energy sector.
diversification.highlight: Largest single contract in company history

workforce.title: Workforce Expansion to 10,000+
workforce.description: Our workforce grew to over 10,000 professionals across 15 countries. We invested heavily in training programs, safety protocols, and state-of-the-art construction technology to support our expanding operations.

sustainability.title: Sustainability & Innovation Leadership
sustainability.description: Launched our Green Building Division and achieved ISO 14001 certification. We completed our first net-zero carbon project and committed to sustainable construction practices across all operations globally.

present.title: Global Engineering Powerhouse
present.description: Today, MM Contracting stands as one of the region's most respected engineering and construction companies with 12,000+ employees, 1,500+ projects delivered, and operations across 25+ countries worldwide.
